message:
feat(e2e): add structured swarm stress metrics and parameterized scale tests

Refactor existing 200-pane stress tests into reusable parameterized
helpers (run_idle_hot_only_scenario, run_active_warm_tier_scenario)
and add smaller-scale tests (50 and 100 panes) for faster CI feedback.

Add emit_swarm_metric() helper that outputs structured JSON with
FT_SWARM_METRIC prefix containing: pane_count, rss_mb, cpu_percent,
frame_time_p50/p99, events_dropped, backpressure_tier, duration_s,
and status. This enables external harnesses to collect and aggregate
metrics across test runs.

Instrument all existing stress tests (throughput, lifecycle churn,
emergency backpressure) with metric emission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
